description: Composition Blue printed kurta made of a blended fabric, has an embroidered yoke, mandarin collar with a V-neck, three-quarter sleeves with piping at the hem, and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Inspired by traditional Indian prints and designs, this kurta from aneri combines the classic combination of blue, black and white with ethnic designs, making it a fab addition to your wardrobe. Crafted from soft fabric, this kurta is sure to offer exemplary comfort. Team it with leggings and chunky earrings. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
